docket_entries.description: DEFENDANT(S) REJECTED PROPOSED ARBITRATOR ROBERT H BLUMENTHAL.
ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-13-2003 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 212. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE TO GEORGE D. OLIVER, ESQ., FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE 10/7/02 PRE-ARBITRATION SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR. STIPULATION TO CONTINUE CONFERENCE FILED ON 10/4/2002. THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS ORDERED DISSOLVED. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: LETICIA PEREZ. (212)
